revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:4 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:4月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 4월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:四月十四]][[zh:四月十四]]
{{Not to be confused with|April 14|qq=April 14}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=四月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 4월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar April|qq=}} '''April 14''' is the 14th day of month {{ill|April (Lunisolar)|ja|4月 (旧暦)|lt=April (Uzuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 4th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}} . == Events == * Year 1 of {{ill|Tempyo-Kampo|ja|Tenpyō感宝|1=Tenpyō-kanpō|2=ja|3=天平感宝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tempyo-Kampo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1373199}} (Julian calendar {{ill|May 4|en|May 4|qid=Q2549|lt=May 4|1=May 4}} , {{ill|749|en|749|qid=Q23624|lt=749|1=749}} ) – Following a tribute of gold from {{ill|Rikuo|en|Rikuo|qid=Q18230545|lt=Mutsu Province|1=Rikuo}} , the era name is changed from {{ill|Tempyo|ja|Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō|2=ja|3=天平|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tempyo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1199879}} to Tempyo-Kampo. Within the same year, it is further changed to {{ill|Tempyo-Shōhō|ja|Tenpyō勝宝|1=Tenpyō-shōhō|2=ja|3=天平勝宝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tempyo-Shōhō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1373169}} . * Year 1 of {{ill|Eishō (Heian period)|en|Eishō (Heian period)|qid=Q1193549|lt=Eishō (Heian period)|1=Eishō (Heian period)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|May 22|en|May 22|qid=Q2581|lt=May 22|1=May 22}} , {{ill|1046|en|1046|qid=Q19354|lt=1046|1=1046}} ) – Era name change from {{ill|Kantoku|en|Kantoku|qid=Q1193536|lt=Kantoku|1=Kantoku}} to Eishō. * Year 6 of {{ill|Daiei (era)|en|Daiei (era)|qid=Q1193564|lt=Daiei (Japan)|1=Daiei (era)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|May 25|en|May 25|qid=Q2585|lt=May 25|1=May 25}} , {{ill|1526|en|1526|qid=Q6325|lt=1526|1=1526}} ) – {{ill|Imagawa Ujichika|en|Imagawa Ujichika|qid=Q909023|lt=Imagawa Ujichika|1=Imagawa Ujichika}} , Governor of {{ill|Suruga Province|ja|Suruga Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suruga Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , establishes the 33-article house law, known as the {{ill|Imagawa Kana Mokuroku|ja|今川仮名目録|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imagawa Kana Mokuroku|1=Imagawa Kana Mokuroku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10883973}} . * Year 4 of {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|May 12|en|May 12|qid=Q2559|lt=May 12|1=May 12}} , {{ill|1576|en|1576|qid=Q6700|lt=1576|1=1576}} ) – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|qid=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}} attacks {{ill|Ishiyama Hongan-ji|ja|摂津石山城|1=Ishiyama Hongan-ji|2=ja|3=石山本願寺|qid=Q1098123|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishiyama Hongan-ji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , the stronghold of {{ill|Kōsa|en|Kōsa|qid=Q1045296|lt=Kenchō|1=Kōsa}} . * Year 16 of {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|May 9|en|May 9|qid=Q2556|lt=May 9|1=May 9}} , {{ill|1588|en|1588|qid=Q6757|lt=1588|1=1588}} ) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qid=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} welcomes {{ill|Emperor Go-Yōzei|en|Emperor Go-Yōzei|qid=Q349440|lt=Emperor Go-Yōzei|1=Emperor Go-Yōzei}} to the {{ill|Jurakudai|en|Jurakudai|qid=Q910041|lt=Jurakudai|1=Jurakudai}} . == Births == * (Julian calendar {{ill|May 30|en|May 30|qid=Q2590|lt=May 30|1=May 30}} , {{ill|1010|en|1010|qid=Q19237|lt=1010|1=1010}} ) – {{ill|Nhân Tông|en|Nhân Tông|qid=Q20943819|lt=Emperor Renzong of Song|1=Nhân Tông}} , 4th emperor of the {{ill|Northern Song dynasty|ja|北宋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Northern Song dynasty|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Northern Song (960–1127)|qid=Q319460}} (d. {{ill|1063|en|1063|qid=Q19400|lt=1063|1=1063}} ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|qid=Q1325419|lt=Genji (Edo period)|1=Genji era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|May 19|en|May 19|qid=Q2578|lt=May 19|1=May 19}} , {{ill|1864|en|1864|qid=Q7704|lt=1864|1=1864}} ) – {{ill|Yoshida Tōgo|ja|吉田東伍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshida Tōgo|1=Tōgo Yoshida|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11413910}} , historian and geographer (d. {{ill|1918|en|1918|qid=Q2094|lt=1918|1=1918}} ). == Deaths == * Year 3 of {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|May 17|en|May 17|qid=Q2575|lt=May 17|1=May 17}} , {{ill|1867|en|1867|qid=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}} ) – {{ill|Takasugi Shinsaku|en|Takasugi Shinsaku|qid=Q700310|lt=Takasugi Shinsaku|1=Takasugi Shinsaku}} , pro-Imperial loyalist and founder of the {{ill|Kiheitai|en|Kiheitai|qid=Q710429|lt=Kiheitai|1=Kiheitai}} (b. {{ill|1839|en|1839|qid=Q7616|lt=1839|1=1839}} ).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|13|4|15|3|14|5|4|0414|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
